release_notes: v1.2.0 — IMPORTANT FIX: Knowledge edits (prompt families, brands, features) made in an installed copy were silently lost on every update; they now persist in your user profile. NEW: Product Catalog tab syncs verified specs for every current Firman model straight from firmanpowerequipment.com, and a Scan finds AI responses stating wrong specs about your models (wrong wattage, non-inverter called an inverter) — each with the claim, the verified truth, and the offending sentence. Visibility gains a Matrix tab: a brand-by-prompt-family heatmap showing who owns which buying question. Prompt library: move prompts between families, merge families, and Export/Import the whole library via CSV/Excel with validation. Also: Strategic Opportunities report no longer clips text off the page, and minimizing during a collection shows a compact progress chip.
